CustomField.description: Reference to the original PublicComplaint record that this comment is a near-duplicate of, as detected by NEPA_Comment_Duplicate_Check flow. Set when nepa_is_duplicate__c = true. Supports administrative record deduplication and response consolidation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Original comment record this submission duplicates. Set by AI duplicate detection. Review both records before responding.
CustomField.label: Duplicate Of
